title: Hycote Alloy Wheel Paint, 400ml
features: PROFESSIONAL FINISH: Achieve a high-quality, durable finish with this premium aerosol wheel paint containing UV-resistant lacquer
EASY APPLICATION: Easy to use spray paint that provides a chrome or custom finish for alloy wheels
ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Environmentally friendly formula that is powerful and long-lasting for a professional quality result
HIGH PERFORMANCE: High-performance blend of paints and primers for a strong, durable coating on your wheels
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for use as both paint remover or wheel primer before painting your alloys in the desired colour scheme
description: From the manufacturer Dedicated in researching on Car Aerosol Spray Paint Our state-of-the-art technical center researches coating technologies and houses the coating test equipment, including accelerated weathering and corrosion testing. This enables us to develop and launch innovative Hycote-branded products that deliver professional results with superior coverage, extreme durability, and super-fast drying with no runs or drips. The Aerosol Spray Paint for you Using compressed consol technology, Hycote paints offer up to double the coverage of conventional spray paint cans with less packaging. Tested at Hycote’s state-of-the-art technical research center to ensure super-fast drying, extreme durability, and excellent adhesion to primed surfaces. More that just a Car Paint Hycote Spray Paint is a premium spray paint with fast drying and exceptional durability, adhesion, and smoothness. For use with wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic. Proud to be British With its base in Greater Manchester, James Briggs Limited is one of the leading aerosol and touch-up paints manufacturers in the UK and Europe.
